ValidationRule.description: Sum of the distribution amount should be equal to the related Credit Memo amount.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(!$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, OR( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Status__c, "Approved"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Status__c, "Declined") ), OR( TEXT(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Status__c)) = "Pending", TEXT(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Status__c)) = "Submitted" ), leaseworks__Total_Distribution_Amount__c <> leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Amount_New__c, leaseworks__Total_Distribution_Amount__c > 0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Sum of the distribution amount should be equal to the related Credit Memo amount.
